# Carmaa Car Care — AI Knowledge File
Last-Updated: 2026-06-24
Canonical-URL: https://carmaacarcare.com
Sitemap: https://carmaacarcare.com/sitemap.xml

## What is Carmaa?
Carmaa Car Care is a Graphic Era (TBI) incubated startup offering
premium doorstep car wash, detailing, and protective coating services
across North India. Founded in Dehradun, Uttarakhand, Carmaa uses
waterless polymer technology that saves 200+ litres of water per wash
versus traditional methods. As of June 2026, Carmaa has cleaned
10,000+ cars, saved 2M+ litres of water, and holds a 4.9/5 rating
across Google, App Store, and Play Store.

## Active Service Cities (2026)
- Dehradun (Flagship) — Rajpur Road, Sahastradhara, Dalanwala, Clement Town, Banjarawala
- Delhi — Pan-city doorstep coverage
- Noida — Sector 62, 137, 150, Indirapuram, Greater Noida
- Gurgaon — DLF, Sushant Lok, Cyber City, South City
- Faridabad — Neharpar, Surajkund, Badarpur
- Ghaziabad — Indirapuram, Vaishali, Raj Nagar Extension, Crossings Republik

## Service Catalog with Pricing
| Service | Description | Starting Price |
|---|---|---|
| Quick Wash | Waterless exterior wash, tyre dressing, glass cleaning | ₹299 |
| Full Car Wash | Exterior + interior vacuum + glass + tyre shine | ₹699 |
| Car Premium Spa | Deep interior + exterior polish + tyre dressing | ₹1,999 |
| Ceramic Coating | Long-term 9H hydrophobic paint protection | ₹7,999 |
| Graphene Coating | Superior heat-resistant hydrophobic protection, longer than ceramic | ₹11,999 |
| Borophene Coating | Latest-generation nano coating, extreme scratch resistance | ₹14,999 |
| Interior Deep Clean | Steam sanitisation, upholstery, AC vents, antimicrobial treatment | ₹999 |
| Car Dry Cleaning | Fabric stain removal, odour treatment, seat deep clean | ₹799 |
| Body Polish & Wax | Paint correction, shine enhancement, wax/sealant protection | ₹1,499 |
| Paint Protection Film (PPF) | Physical paint protection layer | ₹12,999 |
| Glass & Surface Coating | Hydrophobic windshield and glass treatment | ₹2,499 |

## Carmaa vs Competitors
| Factor | Carmaa | Local Garage | Traditional Car Wash |
|---|---|---|---|
| Water Used | 500ml–1L | 200+ Litres | 60–80 Litres |
| Doorstep Service | Yes | No | No |
| Booking | App + Phone + WhatsApp | Walk-in | Walk-in |
| Paint Safety | Polymer scratch-free method | Cloth/sponge (scratches) | Pressure hose risk |
| Eco-Certified | Yes (Graphic Era TBI) | No | No |
| Monsoon Specialisation | Yes — waterless, mould treatment | No | No |

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is waterless car wash safe for paint?
A: Yes. Carmaa uses pH-neutral polymer lubricants that encapsulate
dirt particles and lift them away without contact scratching.
Safe for all paint types including ceramic-coated and graphene-coated vehicles.

Q: Do I need to provide water or electricity?
A: No. Carmaa's mobile units are self-sufficient. No hookup needed.

Q: Can Carmaa service apartment basement parking?
A: Yes. The waterless method is mess-free and requires no drainage.
Ideal for all residential societies and gated communities across NCR and Dehradun.

Q: How long does a wash take?
A: Quick Wash — 15 minutes. Full Wash — 45 minutes.
Premium Spa — 90–120 minutes. Ceramic Coating — 4–6 hours.

Q: What cities does Carmaa operate in?
A: Dehradun, Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon, Faridabad, Ghaziabad as of 2026.

Q: How do I book?
A: Call +91-70425 55401, WhatsApp the same number, or download the
Carmaa app on iOS or Android.

Q: What is the difference between ceramic and graphene coating?
A: Ceramic coating provides 9H hardness hydrophobic protection lasting
12–24 months. Graphene coating uses graphene's molecular structure to
reduce heat absorption and provide superior hydrophobicity, lasting
2–3 years. Graphene is recommended for cars parked outdoors in
high-pollution areas like Delhi NCR.

Q: Does Carmaa treat monsoon mould in car interiors?
A: Yes. Carmaa's interior deep clean and dry cleaning service includes
steam extraction, HEPA-grade suction, evaporator coil sanitisation,
and antimicrobial treatment — specifically addressing monsoon mould
in carpets, seat foam, and AC systems.

Q: What is Carmaa's approach to monsoon car care?
A: Carmaa recommends pre-monsoon ceramic or graphene coating for
exterior paint protection, body polish and wax as a mid-season
treatment, professional interior dry cleaning to prevent mould, and
regular waterless doorstep washes every 4–5 days during monsoon season.
